use_cases: Displaying animated flight routes on travel booking or airline websites
Visualizing global logistics and supply chain networks on dashboards
Showing geographic data points and connections for news or analytics platforms
Creating interactive globes for SaaS products with international user bases
Enhancing landing pages with engaging 3D world visualizations
ai_summary: An interactive 3D globe component powered by Cobe that renders flight arcs between geographic coordinates and location markers. Features drag-to-rotate interactions with smooth animations and supports customizable flight paths and markers. Uses a dark visual style ideal for showcasing global data visualization on modern web applications.
